name: Brain-Inspired Graph Multi-Agent Systems (BIGMAS) for LLM Reasoning

four_principles_filter.去粗取精: 研讨厅按 intake_score≥0.6 + 子系统匹配入库
four_principles_filter.去伪存真: 代码级落地/规划态已在决策中标注
four_principles_filter.由表及里: 研讨厅驱动正式入库固化

digest_notes: BIGMAS organizes specialized LLM agents as nodes in a dynamically constructed directed graph inspired by Global Workspace Theory, coordinating exclusively through a centralized shared workspace. A problem-adaptive GraphDesigner constructs task-specific agent topologies while a global Orchestrator leverages the complete shared state for routing decisions. Experiments on Game24, Six Fives, and Tower of London demonstrate consistent improvements for both standard LLMs and LRMs, outperforming ReAct
